channel.title: Comments on: Bell’s Brewery, Part 1: Porter and Two Hearted IPA, Ep. 48
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Jeremy
item.dc:creator: Jeremy
item.description: I grew up in Michigan, and I'm currently living in Atlanta. Bell's is probably my favorite brewery, so thanks for the great news that Bell's will be available in GA soon! Cheers!
item.content:encoded: I grew up in Michigan, and I’m currently living in Atlanta. Bell’s is probably my favorite brewery, so thanks for the great news that Bell’s will be available in GA soon! Cheers!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: Yep. Got bottles of Monk's Revenge chilling in the fridge!
item.content:encoded: Yep. Got bottles of Monk’s Revenge chilling in the fridge!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Hey Ryan,
Our good friend and BATV contributor Davis Little is working on getting us that Terrapin beer. We hope to shoot that episode very soon and I'm looking forward to trying it!
item.content:encoded:
Hey Ryan,

Our good friend and BATV contributor Davis Little is working on getting us that Terrapin beer. We hope to shoot that episode very soon and I’m looking forward to trying it!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: If you guys get a chance you really need to try the Terrapin Side Project: Volume 5 Monk's Revenge. It is probably the best beer that I have ever had.
item.content:encoded: If you guys get a chance you really need to try the Terrapin Side Project: Volume 5 Monk’s Revenge. It is probably the best beer that I have ever had.

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: Just got done watching the episode. Sounds like you guys got some very interesting beer here. Can't wait until April to try the Porter since those are my favorite style.
item.content:encoded: Just got done watching the episode. Sounds like you guys got some very interesting beer here. Can’t wait until April to try the Porter since those are my favorite style.

item.title: By: Josh
item.dc:creator: Josh
item.content:encoded:
If you like Bell’s … check out our brewery video tour and brewer bio of Larry Bell (plus a whole bunch of other Bell’s related stuff) here.

Cheers!

– KB
